pullRequest.title: Add docker build and optional deployment workflows
pullRequest.body:
Closes #726. (Well depending on whether the definition of done is that the images are actually published or just able to be published)

This PR picks up from #801 and includes that author's original commits (merged into this branch to maintain their authorship).

Additional changes compared to #801 are:

* Made the Docker deployment job conditional based on whether or not the Dockerhub credentials are present
* Updated to latest available runner image `ubuntu-2204:2025.09.1`
* Reverted `apt-get` usage to `apt`
* Minor fix for the `AS` keyword which some sort of Docker linter complained about when I was testing it locally
```
 1 warning found (use docker --debug to expand):
 - FromAsCasing: 'as' and 'FROM' keywords' casing do not match (line 6)
Containerfile:6
--------------------
   4 |
   5 |     # Prep everything
   6 | >>> FROM docker.io/python:3.11.5-bullseye as build
   7 |
   8 |     # Install webp dependencies
--------------------

pullRequest.title: Fix dependency installation in the container
